positive: A vibrant, central composition featuring a celestial forest scene. The design depicts stylized, glowing flora and interconnected geometric constellations wrapping around an ancient, stylized tree silhouette. The style should be highly detailed line art mixed with bold, neon-pop watercolor washes, achieving a clean, graphic, yet mystical look. Emphasis on high contrast: deep midnight blues and purples contrasting sharply with vibrant emerald greens, electric teals, and glowing gold accents. The composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, designed to wrap cleanly around an article of clothing. Minimal shading, maximum silhouette impact. Flat vector graphic aesthetic with airbrush gradients.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, noise, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, grainy, photorealism, grunge, muted colors
